title: OddSense's Visible Powder Snow
description: Makes powder snow visible in a Vanilla style
body:
Changes the powder snow texture to be much more blue while staying consistent to vanilla, and no longer being easily confused for diamonds

Changes ONLY the powder snow texture


https://www.youtube.com/@OdSens
![A mountain with powder snow with the resource pack on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a727bce472b4628f55f113380beca5c75b7b6133_0.webp)
